ListEipBp.marker: The starting position for batch list queries, a system-generated string
ListEipBp.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, not exceeding 1000. Default value is 1000
ListEipBp.id: The ID of the bandwidth package to query
ListEipBp.name: The name of the bandwidth package to query
ListEipBp.bindType: The type of resource bound to the queried bandwidth package, either "eip" (Elastic IP) or "eipgroup" (Shared Bandwidth)
ListEipBp.type: The type of bandwidth package, including BandwidthPackage and AccelerationPackage (cross-border acceleration package). All types are selected by default
